scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @cam/shared && npm run build --workspace @cam/geometry2d && npm run build --workspace @cam/model && npm run build --workspace @cam/engine && npm run build --workspace @cam/importers && npm run build --workspace @cam/ai
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @cam/api && npm run build --workspace @cam/web
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run test:workspaces
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test:workspaces
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @cam/api --
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @cam/web --
